description: Add a cross-domain E2E test that starts with both a discovery finding and a procurement finding, records evidence and structured review feedback, accepts and promotes through the Acquisition workflow, creates or links the Commercial Signal, and creates a Pursuit through the supported workflow. Acceptance: actor/policy behavior, PubSub refresh, provenance, review decisions, dedupe, and idempotent repeat submission are asserted without calling raw transition interfaces.
title: Prove review to pursuit end to end
